text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, I was so close... I know it's not that bad a
result, but it's still frustrating...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Haha... I guess I'm still a step short from claiming
victory...
choice_data_list: But you gave it your all!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Yeah, you're right! I did!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But I'm still upset that I didn't make it to first
place...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"Heavy is the trophy that slipped from your
grasp"... I'll just have to train harder. Then victory
will be even sweeter!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
You're right... I can't simply accept the placement
I got this time.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
"To see the light, you must run toward it!" I need
to train more to make sure I place first next time!
